stemHtml:
An aircraft flies from airport A to airport B, covering a total distance of 460 NM. After 1 h 09 min, it has covered a distance of 183 NM, and its remaining fuel is equal to 780 lb plus reserves. Determine the remaining fuel at airport B, assuming conditions remain the same and given:

TAS: 185 kt
Headwind: 30 kt
Trip fuel: 1098 lb
Fuel flow: 370 lb/h
